query:
UPDATE players p
SET 
  completedCycles = (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ),
  totalPuzzles = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(totalPuzzles), 0) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ),
  totalCorrect = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(correctCount), 0) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ),
  totalTimeMs = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(totalTimeMs), 0) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  )
WHERE p.userId IN (SELECT DISTINCT userId FROM cycle_history WHERE userId IS NOT NULL);
